subcodes.first_line: O Offshoot of the Divine Lote-Tree! May God make thee verdant, flourishing, fresh, tender, blossoming and fruit-laden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنون منشعب از سدره الهیه جعلک الله خضرا نضرا رطبا طریا مزهرا مثمرا این
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
